submitted_payload.suggested_entry: Ralph Workflow — free/open-source workflow layer for autonomous coding with plan-build-verify loops and reviewable repo-native handoffs.

why_this_action: Codeberg adoption is flat, Apollo is already in a live measurement window, and Reddit is structurally weak. LaunchKit Tools is a fresh developer-facing coding directory with an explicit submission path and contact address, making it a stronger untouched distribution lane than another repeated Reddit or curator tactic.

verification.submit_page_note: LaunchKit submit page is live but the HTML form action still points to https://formspree.io/f/PLACEHOLDER, so the public form is not safely usable as-is.

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, live listing, or visible third-party citation/backlink that points evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or listing signal arrives by the review date, do not resend the same pitch; replace it with a different untouched distribution surface.
